_meta.purpose: Rate/budget limit for EXTERNAL-agent dispatches, enforced at the delegation boundary by scripts/ai/lib/agent_dispatch_budget.py. Caps how many times each external agent (and all of them together) can be dispatched within a rolling window — bounds runaway agent loops (cost for paid lanes like codex; outbound-message volume for all).
_meta.notes: Reads .agents/delegation/registry.jsonl (shared by all lanes; each dispatch has agent + created ts). Counts only the configured external agents toward the global cap, so local inference is not charged. Generous defaults catch runaway loops without breaking legitimate bursts. enforcement=block refuses over-budget dispatch (rc 3); enforcement=warn audits + allows. Bypass one call with the bypass_env; disable entirely by setting global.enabled=false.
